understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to maneuver selectable pieces (P and S) onto goal positions (+) by switching control between them and moving them into place, likely within the limited step budget per level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement shifts the selected piece (P) in a direction unless blocked by walls (#) or boundaries; pushable blocks (B) can be pushed if adjacent; CLICK switches selection to another selectable (S) at exact pixel coordinates without moving objects; walls block movement variably, and rapid clicking between pieces wasted steps while successful moves positioned pieces correctly before steps ran out.
